findings.title: validate.sh dispatches undocumented rule scripts outside the advertised audit surface
findings.summary: The live dispatcher runs a broader rule set than the published inventory, so help text and packet prompts are not authoritative.

findings.title: decision-record.md ships a malformed description placeholder
findings.summary: The Level 3 decision-record template carries a broken frontmatter description placeholder with a stray comment terminator.

findings.title: The 21-rule surface mixes template contracts with operational runtime guards
findings.summary: Runtime/save-time rules are being counted alongside authored-template checks, which inflates coverage claims and leaves several template fields unowned.

findings.title: TEMPLATE_SOURCE is a live template-contract rule but remains absent from the published validator inventory
findings.summary: The provenance rule is enforced live, but published help and README surfaces still omit it.
